title: Italian Cod Casserole
description: A simple yet flavorful Italian-inspired cod casserole, perfect for a weeknight dinner. The delicate cod pairs well with the rich flavors of tomato sauce and melted mozzarella.
instructions: Grease the casserole dish with olive oil.
Season the cod with salt and pepper.
Place the cod in the casserole dish, leaving a small border around the edges.
Pour the tomato sauce over the cod.
Sprinkle the mozzarella and parmesan cheese over the sauce.
Dot the top with garlic and basil.
Cover the casserole with aluminum foil and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through and the cheese is melted and golden brown.
